competitors.aiSummary:
# Kamino Summary

Kamino's RWA markets reached $1.15B+ deposits across six markets (private credit, tokenized equities, reinsurance). The Rockaway_X RWA USDC Vault accumulated $34M in two months with 5.61% supply APY. Kamino operates on Solana, leveraging Chainlink integration for onchain capital market scaling.

tweets.fullText:
The @Rockaway_X RWA USDC Vault has surpassed $34M in deposits in ~2 months.

USDC is actively allocated across PRIME, OnRe, and Huma markets, delivering 5.61% supply APY (90D avg) and $105K in interest generated over 60 days.

Onchain capital markets continue to scale on Kamino. https://t.co/7Vh8tyx01o
